case_number: constituted under the orders of Honourable

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-1507 of 2010. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 25.01.2022 Mr. Javed Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Asif Ali Abdul Razzak Soomro, Advocate for the respondents No.1 and 2 Mr. Muhammad Imran Abbasi, Asst:A.G Pakistan. = * = * = * = * = * = At very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of the instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits, provided the petitioner subject to law is permitted to put his appearance before the Committee at Principle Seat, which is constituted under the orders of Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan to monitor the development work, which is being carried out in Province of Sindh by PPL and OGDCL, on account of discovery of Oil and Gas in respective areas. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE.
